nodes.name: Webhook: VAPI Reminder Callback
nodes.notes: Receives events from outbound VAPI reminder calls (function-call results, end-of-call-report)

parameters.query: SELECT id, name FROM customers WHERE phone = '{{ $json.customer_phone }}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO interaction_log (customer_id, session_id, channel, interaction_type, user_message, assistant_response, metadata) VALUES ('{{ $('Supabase: Lookup Customer').first().json[0]?.id }}', '{{ $('Code: Parse End-of-Call Report').first().json.call_id }}', 'voice', 'call_transcript', '{{ $('Code: Parse End-of-Call Report').first().json.transcript.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Code: Parse End-of-Call Report').first().json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify({ call_type: "outbound_reminder", duration_seconds: $('Code: Parse End-of-Call Report').first().json.duration_seconds, ended_reason: $('Code: Parse End-of-Call Report').first().json.ended_reason }) }}')

nodes.name: Supabase: Store Reminder Transcript
nodes.notes: Store the outbound reminder call transcript in interaction_log for memory/RAG

nodes.name: Twilio: Alert Salon Owner
nodes.notes: Alert the salon owner if customer wants to cancel/reschedule or didn't answer the reminder call
